title: The Last Message
content: While organizing old emails, Sophia noticed one final message from a former coworker that she had never opened. Curious, she read it carefully. Instead of containing urgent news, the message simply thanked her for helping during a difficult project years earlier and wished her success in the future. The email had remained unread because it was automatically placed in an archived folder. Discovering it so many years later reminded Sophia how meaningful small expressions of gratitude can be. Sometimes the greatest mystery is not what was hidden but what was quietly waiting to be noticed.
